note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left foot wound site, rates 7/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Diabetic diabetic Left foot measures 2.2 cm x 2.6 cm x 0.6 cm.
  Wound bed: 21% slough, 79% granulation tissue. Periwound: erythematous.
  Drainage: moderate. Odor: present, mild.
Assessment: Diabetic diabetic Left foot — not improving.
Plan: Nutritional consult ordered. Foam dressing change daily.

Wound note - Leftfoot. Meas 2.2x2.6x0.6cm. Mod serosang drainage, no odor. Wound bed 66% gran, 34% slough. Periwound macerated. Collagen dsg changed. Pt c/o discomfort w/ dsg change. Dr. Castillo notified.
